activities.heroSubtitle:
11 real user cases, 11 AI Agent configurations.
Pick your role, follow the guide, and build your own OpenClaw automation workflow.
activities.howSubtitle: Four steps to complete your OpenClaw practice journey
activities.step1Desc: Browse the 11 real user cases below and find the role and scenario that best matches you
activities.step2Desc: Dive deep into the Agent configuration, skill combinations, and workflow design for that role
activities.step3Desc: Follow the guide to configure your AI Agent network on the OpenClaw platform
activities.step4Desc: Submit your configuration practice to AI In Action and exchange insights with the community

activities.ctaSubtitle:

Whether you're a developer, marketer, founder, or freelancer,
there's an AI automation solution for you.
